steps.title: Trace problem and response
steps.content: The text begins with demolition waste, then explains Portland's response: requiring some buildings to be deconstructed so materials can be reused. It ends with results from a 2019 study.

steps.title: Reject absent claims
steps.content: B invents public support trends, C claims deconstruction is ineffective, and D invents comparisons with other cities. The passage explains Portland's effort to reduce demolition waste and reports reuse and recycling outcomes. The answer is A.
